results.title: Six-Goal Thriller Sends Algeria, Austria Through
results.description: Riyad Mahrez starred with two goals as Algeria and Austria played out a thrilling 3-3 draw to secure FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 qualification from Group J.

results.title: Why Vaibhav Sooryavanshi Should Not Be Picked For 2nd India vs Ireland T20I Too, Ex-Star Explains
results.description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi did not play the 1st India vs Ireland T20I.

results.title: Why Vaibhav Sooryavanshi Should Not Be Picked For 2nd T20I Too
results.description: Amid the clamour over Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's likely inclusion, India lost to Ireland in the first T20I of a two-match series

results.title: Japan, Australia keep Asia's World Cup hopes alive
results.description: by sportswriters Cao Jianjie and Li Jia MIAMI, United States, June 27 (Xinhua) -- The final whistle on the World Cup group stage brought mixed emotions for Asian football. Japan and Australia marched on, but seven of the continent's representatives were heading home. Japan was the standout performer, finishing second in Group F after an unbeaten campaign against the Netherlands, Tunisia and Sweden.
